_note: STAGED manifest for the rebuilt scripture-study public repo. Lands at scripture-study/.claude-plugin/plugin.json at cutover (P3). Kept here in the workspace root during staging so it is authored + reviewable before the repo is rebuilt.
name: scripture-study
description: Study scripture with AI, done honestly. Craft skills (read-before-quoting source verification, scripture linking, Webster 1828 and Strong's word-work, the phased study workflow, the discernment rubric), agent modes (study, lesson, talk, gospel-YouTube evaluation, gospel research), and the gospel MCP servers (scripture + talk search, Webster, Strong's, BYU citation index) — bundled so one install gives the whole method plus the tools.
